scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.check-env-local:
if [ -f .env.local ]; then echo '
❌ .env.local exists and would silently override .env.production for this build (e.g. NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL), shipping a broken production bundle. Remove or rename it first (e.g. mv .env.local .env.local.disabled).
' && exit 1; fi
scripts.preview: npm run check-env-local && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare preview
scripts.deploy: npm run check-env-local && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare deploy
scripts.upload: npm run check-env-local && opennextjs-cloudflare build && opennextjs-cloudflare upload
